tone_notes: JD emphasizes systems-level ownership, operational rigor, and production impact over pure research. Tone should be pragmatic, outcome-focused, and highlight ownership of end-to-end systems — avoid academic framing; emphasize reliability, scalability, and maintainability. Mirror JD's emphasis on 'not a feature role' by underscoring platform thinking over model tuning.
summary_angle: Position Conner as a systems-minded engineer who builds production-grade ML infrastructure by leveraging DevSecOps rigor, cloud-native orchestration, and data engineering fundamentals — with AI/ML experience grounded in real-world RAG and NLP tooling, not just theory.
